set-variable.value: #[{ errorCode: "400", errorMessage: error.description default error.errorType, errorType: "SHOPIFYPAPI:" ++ (error.errorType as String replace "VALIDATION:" with "VALIDATION_"), failedAt: now(), retryCount: (vars.retryCount default 0) + 1, lastRetryAt: now(), correlationId: vars.correlationId default correlationId, sourceQueue: vars.sourceQueue default "UNKNOWN" }]
set-variable.doc:name: Set error Response Variable

set-payload.doc:name: Set Error Payload

set-variable.value: #[{ errorCode: (error.statusCode default "500") as String, errorMessage: error.description default "HTTP ERROR", errorType: if (error.description contains "Salesforce") "SALESFORCE_API:CONNECTIVITY" else if (error.description contains "Shopify") "SHOPIFY_API:CONNECTIVITY" else "HTTP:CONNECTIVITY", failedAt: now(), retryCount: (vars.retryCount default 0) + 1, lastRetryAt: now(), correlationId: vars.correlationId default correlationId, sourceQueue: vars.sourceQueue default "UNKNOWN" }]
set-variable.doc:name: Set error Response Variable

set-payload.doc:name: Set Error Payload
